caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The man is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either recording a podcast or participating in an interview. The setting is decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly sharing his thoughts or experiences, as indicated by his attentive posture and the presence of the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setting for a discussion or interview.
